summary: Completed testing of wholesale pricing Excel upload feature (iteration 3). All 36 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for 3 upload dropzones and Products List with pre-filled wholesale prices. New features verified: POST /api/upload/wholesale (matched_count=518, total=1460), GET /api/upload-status with wholesale_count=518, GET /api/products/all with user_wholesale_price field, and frontend showing Χονδρικές Τιμές dropzone with green checkmark.
seed_data_creation: Wholesale prices uploaded via /api/upload/wholesale from /app/artifacts/wholesale_pricing.xlsx. 518 products matched by EAN out of 1460 total prices in file.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests extended with TestWholesalePricing class (5 new tests). Product UID 7389176 (AM Health Magnesium Liposomal) has wholesale price 7.52€ from Excel upload. The upload-status endpoint now returns wholesale_count field. Products with user_wholesale_price show pre-filled values in the Products List Χονδρική column.

features_verified.POST /api/upload/wholesale: Returns matched_count=518, total_prices_in_file=1460. Matches products by EAN in column B.
features_verified.Frontend 3 dropzones: Report Listed (589), FBS Products (588), Χονδρικές Τιμές (518) - all show green checkmarks
features_verified.Wholesale dropzone state: Shows green checkmark with '518 προϊόντα ενημερώθηκαν' text
features_verified.Products List Χονδρική column: Shows pre-filled wholesale prices from Excel (e.g., 7.52€ for product 7389176)
features_verified.FBS Τιμή calculation: Automatically calculates FBS final price based on wholesale input (e.g., 14.20€ for 7.52€ wholesale)
features_verified.Export Excel button: Shows count (518) of products with wholesale prices
